cases.description: Skill triggers for a one-off social card request
cases.prompt: Make me an Instagram post about our 2.0 launch.
expectations: The agent invokes the codi-content-factory skill
The agent runs scripts/start-server.sh with --project-dir flag
The agent calls POST /api/create-project with type set to social
The agent writes an HTML file containing at least one <article class="social-card"> element
The generated HTML contains a <meta name="codi:template"> tag with type set to social
The agent does NOT create a brief.json (fast-path, not anchor-first)

cases.description: Skill triggers for a slide deck request
cases.prompt: Build me a 10-slide deck about API caching strategies.
expectations: The agent invokes the codi-content-factory skill
The agent calls POST /api/create-project with type set to slides
The generated HTML contains <article class="slide"> elements with data-type and data-index attributes
The agent reads references/design-system.md before authoring any slide
The agent reads references/slide-deck-engine.md before authoring the deck

cases.description: Skill triggers for a document / blog post request
cases.prompt: Write a technical guide about setting up edge caching with Cloudflare.
expectations: The agent calls POST /api/create-project with type set to document
The generated HTML contains <article class="doc-page"> elements
The agent reads references/docx-export.md for page discipline
Each .doc-page follows the .page-header + .page-body + .page-footer structure

cases.description: Skill triggers for a multi-format anchor-first campaign
cases.prompt: Create a campaign about how we cut API latency 80% with edge caching. I want a blog, LinkedIn carousel, and Instagram story.
expectations: The agent invokes the codi-content-factory skill
The agent reads references/methodology.md before authoring any content
The agent reads references/anchor-authoring.md before writing the anchor
The agent writes an anchor file as document type (A4) first, before any variants
The agent asks the user to approve the anchor before distilling
The agent calls POST /api/anchor/approve only after explicit user approval
Each variant HTML contains a <meta name="codi:variant"> tag with derivedFromRevision (camelCase, not snake_case)

cases.description: Skill resolves 'this slide' to the active card
cases.prompt: Make this headline shorter and bolder.
expectations: The agent calls GET /api/state to read activeCard before editing
The agent uses activeCard.dataIdx to locate the element, not the card's index
The agent rewrites the whole file (required for WebSocket watcher to broadcast reload)
The agent confirms which card changed in its reply (e.g. 'Updated slide 3 of 7')

cases.description: Skill uses the persist-style flow for an element-level edit
cases.prompt: Change the color of the element I just clicked to red.
expectations: The agent calls GET /api/active-element before proposing an edit
If context.readOnly is true, the agent calls POST /api/clone-template-to-session before persist-style
The agent calls POST /api/persist-style with targetSelector and patches in the body
The agent does NOT write to the card source file directly (uses the API instead)

cases.description: Skill runs validator after persist-style (Layer 3 agent discipline)
cases.prompt: Change the padding on the card container to 40px.
expectations: The agent calls POST /api/validate-card after POST /api/persist-style completes
If the validator returns pass: false, the agent reads violations[].fix and iterates
The agent reports remaining violations to the user only after exhausting iterateLimit

cases.description: Skill does not trigger for unrelated queries
expectations: The agent does NOT invoke the codi-content-factory skill
The agent does NOT run start-server.sh
The agent does NOT create a project

cases.description: Skill does not trigger for code review or engineering tasks
cases.prompt: Review this Python function for performance issues.
expectations: The agent does NOT invoke the codi-content-factory skill
The agent does NOT create any HTML content files
The agent does NOT start the content factory server

cases.description: Skill does not trigger for generic presentation-software questions
cases.prompt: How do I install Microsoft PowerPoint?
expectations: The agent does NOT invoke the codi-content-factory skill
The agent does NOT create a slide deck project

cases.description: Skill always provides the required type field when creating a project
cases.prompt: Start a project called acme-launch for our new social cards.
expectations: The agent calls POST /api/create-project with both name and type in the body
The type field is one of social, slides, document (not an arbitrary string)
If the user's intent is ambiguous, the agent asks which type before calling create-project

cases.description: When mode is template, skill creates a new project rather than editing the template
cases.prompt: Use this preset for my content.
expectations: The agent calls GET /api/state and reads mode
If mode is template, the agent calls POST /api/create-project before writing any file
The agent does NOT edit the read-only template file in place (unless user explicitly asks to modify the template)
